assertions.evidence: Targeted go test command exited 0 and go test -list included TestDeepSeekModelListing_ConfigAuthRegistryPath. Reviewed test asserts configured synthetic openai-compatibility provider name deepseek exposes client alias ID deepseek-v4 with OwnedBy deepseek and Type openai-compatibility, while upstream deepseek-chat is not client-visible.

Targeted go test command exited 0 and go test -list included TestDeepSeekModelListingAPIFromRegistry. Reviewed API httptest uses authenticated GET /v1/models without client_version, parses JSON, asserts object == list, and finds exactly one data entry id deepseek-v4, object model, owned_by deepseek.

Targeted go test command exited 0 and go test -list included TestDeepSeekModelListing_PrefixAndForcePrefixSemantics. Reviewed prefix matrix expects deepseek-v4 plus ds/deepseek-v4 when force prefix is disabled, and only ds/deepseek-v4 when force prefix is enabled.

Targeted go test command exited 0 and go test -list included TestDeepSeekModelListing_NegativeAndRemovalCases. Reviewed subtests cover disabled config, empty models, credentialless synthetic auth, header credential usability, and removal clearing stale deepseek-v4 registration.

Targeted go test command exited 0; NegativeAndRemovalCases includes no hardcoded default alias by asserting LookupStaticModelInfo("deepseek-v4") == nil. git diff --name-only HEAD exited 0 and showed only .factory/library/user-testing.md, with no runtime default/model catalog Go files in the diff.

Targeted go test command exited 0 and go test -list included TestDeepSeekModelListing_NonDeepSeekProviderWithDeepSeekLookingUpstream. Reviewed test uses openrouter with upstream deepseek/deepseek-r1 and asserts only router-r1 is exposed with owned_by openrouter, while deepseek-v4 and the upstream name are absent.

This validation ran only local go test and git commands, did not access 127.0.0.1:8318, and did not read or print personal config/auth files. Reviewed model-listing/API tests use synthetic keys, in-memory config, httptest, and temp auth/config paths.
